subcodes.first_line: The vision hath been seized and the moon darkened when the Most Great Spectacle appeared and the Lord of Destiny established Himself upon the throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد خطف البصر و خسف القمر اذ ظهر المنظر الاکبر و مالک القدر استقر علی عرش
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
